_meta.note: Airline catalog: provider-label normalization + mock itinerary names, and hand-curated economy/base-fare experience data (legroom, bag fees, snacks, Wi-Fi, seat power) served via /api/airlines/{iata} for the Airline experience cards. Fees are indicative — verify before booking as policies change; international allowances often differ from the US-domestic figures shown.

AA.name: American Airlines
AA.freeSnacks: Free snacks + soft drinks; buy-on-board on most domestic, free meals long-haul
AA.notes: Basic Economy: no seat selection, carry-on allowed (unlike some rivals).

DL.name: Delta Air Lines
DL.freeSnacks: Free snacks + soft drinks; free Wi-Fi messaging; meals on long-haul
DL.wifi: Free Wi-Fi for SkyMiles members on most mainline
DL.notes: Basic Economy includes a full carry-on.

UA.name: United Airlines
UA.freeSnacks: Free snacks + soft drinks; meals long-haul
UA.notes: Basic Economy on many domestic fares allows NO full-size carry-on — watch out.

WN.name: Southwest Airlines
WN.checkedBagFee: First 2 bags historically free; confirm current policy
WN.notes: Open seating model; generous bag policy is its signature.

B6.name: JetBlue
B6.notes: Blue Basic restricts bags; roomiest standard economy in the US.

AS.name: Alaska Airlines
AS.freeSnacks: Free snacks + drinks; fresh food for purchase
AS.notes: Reliable West-coast carrier; baggage fee guarantee on delays.

NK.name: Spirit Airlines
NK.carryOnDimensions: Free personal item: 18 × 14 × 8 in (46 × 36 × 20 cm); overhead (+$): 22 × 18 × 10 in
NK.notes: Ultra-low-cost: base fare is cheap, fees stack fast. THIS is the classic upgrade/bag scam trap.

F9.name: Frontier Airlines
F9.carryOnDimensions: Free personal item: 18 × 14 × 8 in (46 × 36 × 20 cm); overhead (+$): 24 × 16 × 10 in
F9.notes: Ultra-low-cost. Bundle fares to avoid surprise bag/seat fees.

BA.name: British Airways
BA.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most long-haul; Basic (hand-baggage-only) fares charge
BA.freeSnacks: Free meal + drinks long-haul; buy-on-board short-haul Euro Traveller
BA.notes: Short-haul economy is buy-on-board; long-haul includes meals.

VS.name: Virgin Atlantic
VS.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most fares; Economy Light charges

LH.name: Lufthansa
LH.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge

AF.name: Air France
AF.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
AF.notes: Good catering; hub at Paris CDG.

KL.name: KLM
KL.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
KL.notes: Hub at Amsterdam Schiphol; pairs with Air France.

IB.name: Iberia
IB.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Basic fares charge
IB.notes: Madrid hub; strong to Latin America.

LX.name: SWISS
LX.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge

TK.name: Turkish Airlines
TK.checkedBagFee: Generous free allowance on most international fares
TK.wifi: Free Wi-Fi for members on most widebodies
TK.notes: Istanbul hub reaches the most countries of any airline; strong value.

EK.name: Emirates
EK.notes: ICE entertainment system is class-leading; Dubai hub. Roomy economy.

QR.name: Qatar Airways
QR.wifi: Free Wi-Fi (Super Wi-Fi) on much of fleet
QR.notes: Frequently rated world's best airline; Doha hub.

SQ.name: Singapore Airlines
SQ.freeSnacks: Free full meals + drinks; book-the-cook option
SQ.wifi: Free Wi-Fi for members on most
SQ.notes: Benchmark service and catering; Singapore Changi hub.

CX.name: Cathay Pacific
CX.notes: Hong Kong hub; solid long-haul economy.

NH.name: ANA (All Nippon)
NH.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg each) free on most international fares
NH.notes: Very generous free baggage to/from US; excellent service.

JL.name: Japan Airlines (JAL)
JL.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg each) free on most international fares
JL.notes: Roomy economy; 2-bag free allowance is a highlight.

AC.name: Air Canada
AC.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most international; charged on Basic/domestic
AC.notes: Basic (Standard) fares restrict changes and bags.

AM.name: Aeroméxico
AM.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most international; Basic charges

LA.name: LATAM Airlines
LA.checkedBagFee: Often charged on Basic; 1 bag free on higher fares
LA.notes: Largest South American carrier; fare families vary widely on bags.

ET.name: Ethiopian Airlines
ET.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares
ET.notes: Addis Ababa hub; widest African network, generous baggage.

SA.name: South African Airways
SA.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

FI.name: Icelandair
FI.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on Standard+ fares; Economy Light charges
FI.freeSnacks: Buy-on-board in economy; drinks included; meals on some fares
FI.notes: Reykjavík hub; popular for transatlantic with a free stopover in Iceland.

WS.name: WestJet
WS.checkedBagFee: $35+ first bag on most fares; Basic charges more
WS.notes: Calgary hub; UltraBasic fares restrict bags/seat.

AY.name: Finnair
AY.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
AY.notes: Helsinki hub; efficient routings between Europe and Asia.

HA.name: Hawaiian Airlines
HA.freeSnacks: Free meals on most flights (a US rarity) + island-style drinks
HA.notes: Complimentary meals even in economy; strong for Hawaii + Pacific.

SY.name: Sun Country
SY.checkedBagFee: $30–$45 each way; carry-on charged on some fares
SY.notes: Low-cost leisure carrier; fees stack like ULCCs.

G4.name: Allegiant Air
G4.carryOnDimensions: Free personal item under seat; overhead (+$): 22 × 16 × 10 in (56 × 41 × 25 cm)
G4.notes: Ultra-low-cost; base fare is cheap, fees add up fast.

PD.name: Porter Airlines
PD.freeSnacks: Free snacks + beer/wine; no middle seats on jets
PD.notes: Canada; upscale economy feel, complimentary drinks.

FR.name: Ryanair
FR.checkedBagFee: €25–€60 per bag; only a small under-seat bag is free
FR.notes: Cheapest base fares in Europe, but everything is an add-on. Watch bag sizes.

U2.name: easyJet
U2.checkedBagFee: £/€ per bag; one small cabin bag free
U2.carryOnDimensions: Free small: 17.7 × 13.8 × 7.9 in (45 × 35 × 20 cm); overhead on Plus/Flex fares: 22 × 17.7 × 9.1 in
U2.notes: Low-cost; a free small cabin bag is included (unlike Ryanair's strictest fares).

W6.name: Wizz Air
W6.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a small under-seat bag free
W6.notes: Ultra-low-cost across Europe; bundle fares to avoid surprise fees.

VY.name: Vueling
VY.checkedBagFee: Per bag; cabin bag included on Basic

TP.name: TAP Air Portugal
TP.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Discount fares charge
TP.notes: Lisbon hub; free stopover program to/from the Americas.

SK.name: SAS Scandinavian
SK.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; SAS Go Light charges
SK.notes: Scandinavia; hubs in Copenhagen, Oslo, Stockholm.

DY.name: Norwegian
DY.checkedBagFee: Per bag on LowFare; included on higher fares
DY.notes: Low-cost; mostly intra-European after dropping long-haul.

EI.name: Aer Lingus
EI.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Saver fares charge
EI.notes: Dublin hub; US preclearance in Dublin/Shannon.

LO.name: LOT Polish Airlines
LO.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Economy Saver charges

OS.name: Austrian Airlines
OS.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
OS.notes: Vienna hub; part of Lufthansa Group.

SN.name: Brussels Airlines
SN.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
SN.notes: Brussels hub; strong African network; Lufthansa Group.

AZ.name: ITA Airways
AZ.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free long-haul; Light fares charge
AZ.notes: Italy's flag carrier (successor to Alitalia); Rome FCO hub.

EW.name: Eurowings
EW.checkedBagFee: Per bag on Basic; included on Smart
EW.notes: Lufthansa Group's low-cost arm; mostly European.

A3.name: Aegean Airlines
A3.checkedBagFee: 1 bag often free on Flex; Light fares charge
A3.notes: Greece; consistently rated top European regional airline.

CA.name: Air China
CA.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
CA.notes: Beijing hub; flag carrier of China.

CZ.name: China Southern
CZ.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
CZ.notes: Guangzhou hub; one of Asia's largest airlines.

MU.name: China Eastern
MU.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

HU.name: Hainan Airlines
HU.checkedBagFee: 2 bags free on most international fares
HU.notes: Generous baggage; well-rated 5-star service; many US routes.

BR.name: EVA Air
BR.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares
BR.notes: Taiwan; Taipei hub; roomy economy, generous baggage.

CI.name: China Airlines
CI.checkedBagFee: 2 bags free on most international fares

KE.name: Korean Air
KE.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares
KE.notes: Seoul Incheon hub; roomy economy; merging with Asiana.

OZ.name: Asiana Airlines
OZ.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
OZ.notes: Seoul hub; well-rated service; being absorbed by Korean Air.

TG.name: Thai Airways
TG.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags (20–30kg) free on most international fares

VN.name: Vietnam Airlines
VN.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
VN.notes: 4-star carrier; Hanoi/Ho Chi Minh City hubs.

MH.name: Malaysia Airlines
MH.notes: Kuala Lumpur hub; weight-based baggage is generous.

GA.name: Garuda Indonesia
GA.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

PR.name: Philippine Airlines
PR.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares

6E.name: IndiGo
6E.checkedBagFee: Per bag; one cabin bag included
6E.notes: India's largest low-cost carrier; punctual; minimal frills.

AI.name: Air India
AI.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares
AI.notes: Now Tata-owned and modernizing fleet; Delhi/Mumbai hubs.

SG.name: SpiceJet
SG.notes: India low-cost; book bundles to avoid fees.

TR.name: Scoot
TR.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin bag free
TR.notes: Singapore Airlines' low-cost arm; long-haul budget.

AK.name: AirAsia
AK.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin bag free
AK.notes: Asia's biggest low-cost network; Kuala Lumpur hub.

JQ.name: Jetstar
JQ.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin allowance free
JQ.notes: Qantas' low-cost arm; Australia/Asia budget routes.

5J.name: Cebu Pacific
5J.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin bag free

SV.name: Saudia
SV.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares

GF.name: Gulf Air
GF.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

MS.name: EgyptAir
MS.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares

RJ.name: Royal Jordanian
RJ.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

KQ.name: Kenya Airways
KQ.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

AT.name: Royal Air Maroc
AT.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
AT.notes: Casablanca hub; oneworld; gateway to West Africa.

WB.name: RwandAir
WB.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares

AV.name: Avianca
AV.checkedBagFee: Charged on Basic; 1 bag free on higher fares
AV.notes: Bogotá hub; large Latin American network; Star Alliance.

CM.name: Copa Airlines
CM.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most fares; Basic charges
CM.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink; meal on longer flights
CM.notes: Panama City hub — the 'Hub of the Americas'; very reliable.

AD.name: Azul
AD.checkedBagFee: Per bag on lower fares; cabin bag included
AD.freeSnacks: Free snacks + drinks (generous for the region)
AD.notes: Brazil; widest domestic network; free snacks + Wi-Fi stand out.

AR.name: Aerolíneas Argentinas
AR.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most international fares

Y4.name: Volaris
Y4.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on charged on cheapest fares
Y4.carryOnDimensions: Free under-seat item only; overhead (+$): 21.7 × 15.7 × 9.8 in (55 × 40 × 25 cm)
Y4.notes: Mexican ultra-low-cost; base fares cheap, fees stack.

NZ.name: Air New Zealand
NZ.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most international; Seat fares charge
NZ.freeSnacks: Free meals + drinks; famous safety videos
NZ.notes: Auckland hub; consistently top-rated; Skynest bunks rolling out.

VA.name: Virgin Australia
VA.checkedBagFee: Charged on Lite; included on higher fares

FJ.name: Fiji Airways
FJ.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
FJ.notes: Nadi hub; oneworld connect; South Pacific gateway.

MX.name: Breeze Airways
MX.checkedBagFee: $30–$50 first bag; BreezeThru bundled fares include bags
MX.carryOnDimensions: 22 × 14 × 9 in (56 × 36 × 23 cm); overhead included on BreezeThru+ fares only
MX.freeSnacks: Buy on board; complimentary on some longer flights
MX.seatPower: USB-A at every seat on A220
MX.notes: New ULCC (2021) focused on underserved nonstop routes. Nice/Nicer/Nicest bundles clarify fees.

XP.name: Avelo Airlines
XP.checkedBagFee: $39+ first bag; carry-on extra on base fares
XP.carryOnDimensions: 22 × 14 × 9 in (56 × 36 × 23 cm); overhead extra on base fares
XP.notes: Budget carrier (2021) targeting secondary airports. 737 fleet, bare-bones service.

SX.name: JSX
SX.notes: Semi-private hop-on jet service on 30-seat ERJs. Board via FBO lounge — no TSA screening line.

9K.name: Cape Air
9K.carryOnDimensions: No overhead bins — personal items under seat only; strict weight limits
9K.notes: Small regional aircraft (Cessna, Tecnam). Strict weight limits — no overhead bins; weigh yourself and bags before booking.

LF.name: Contour Airlines
LF.carryOnDimensions: 22 × 14 × 9 in (56 × 36 × 23 cm) — limited overhead on CRJ-200
LF.notes: Small regional carrier (CRJ-200s) serving underserved markets. Good legroom for the aircraft size.

OO.name: SkyWest Airlines
OO.notes: Operates as Delta Connection, United Express, Alaska Airlines, and American Eagle. Fees match your mainline ticket.

9E.name: Endeavor Air
9E.notes: Operates exclusively as Delta Connection. Your ticket is with Delta — all fees, perks, and miles apply.

OH.name: PSA Airlines
OH.notes: Operates as American Eagle on regional routes. Fees and status perks match your American ticket.

YX.name: Republic Airways
YX.notes: Regional operator for major US carriers. Your experience is determined by the mainline ticket you hold.

ZW.name: Air Wisconsin
ZW.notes: Operates as American Eagle. CRJ-200 fleet on short regional hops.

PT.name: Piedmont Airlines
PT.carryOnDimensions: Per American policy: 22 × 14 × 9 in (56 × 36 × 23 cm); ATR turboprops gate-check most bags
PT.notes: Operates exclusively as American Eagle. Turboprop and small jet routes from American hubs.

HV.name: Transavia
HV.notes: KLM Group's Dutch low-cost carrier. Strong on Mediterranean leisure routes.

TO.name: Transavia France
TO.notes: Air France Group low-cost for French leisure routes. Similar model to Dutch Transavia.

V7.name: Volotea
V7.checkedBagFee: €15–€50 per bag; carry-on included on most fares
V7.notes: Spanish low-cost focused on secondary French and Italian cities; A319/A320 fleet.

BY.name: TUI Airways
BY.checkedBagFee: Often bundled with package holiday; standalone: £35–£50
BY.freeSnacks: Snacks for purchase; meals on long-haul holiday packages
BY.notes: UK leisure/charter carrier. Mostly sold as part of TUI package holidays; fares can be very cheap on charter seats.

DE.name: Condor
DE.checkedBagFee: Often included in leisure package; standalone €30–€50 first bag
DE.freeSnacks: Buy on board short-haul; included in long-haul leisure fare
DE.notes: German leisure carrier with solid long-haul routes to Americas, Asia, Africa. Strong value on package fares.

UX.name: Air Europa
UX.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most long-haul fares; Basic charges
UX.notes: Madrid hub; SkyTeam; strong to Latin America. Pending IAG acquisition.

PC.name: Pegasus Airlines
PC.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
PC.notes: Turkish ULCC; extensive network from Istanbul Sabiha Gökçen. Can be very cheap if you pack light.

XQ.name: SunExpress
XQ.notes: Turkish–Lufthansa joint venture leisure carrier. Antalya and Turkish city connections to Europe.

JU.name: Air Serbia
JU.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most fares; Basic charges
JU.freeSnacks: Snack + drink on most flights (well-regarded for region)
JU.notes: Belgrade hub; solid Balkan connections and some long-haul. Better service than you'd expect.

QS.name: Smartwings
QS.checkedBagFee: Per bag; small cabin bag free on base fares
QS.notes: Czech low-cost; charter and scheduled leisure routes from Prague and Central Europe.

LS.name: Jet2.com
LS.notes: UK leisure carrier; unlike most LCCs, a checked bag is included. Seats must be reserved for a fee.

X3.name: TUI fly Deutschland
X3.checkedBagFee: Often bundled with package; standalone €35+ first bag
X3.freeSnacks: Buy on board; included in holiday packages
X3.notes: German TUI leisure brand; holiday-focused routes from German airports.

RO.name: TAROM
RO.notes: Romania's national carrier; Bucharest hub. Comfortable for regional Europe.

BT.name: airBaltic
BT.checkedBagFee: 1 bag included on Business Lite+; charged on basic
BT.notes: Latvia; world's first all-Airbus A220 fleet. Punctual and efficient Baltic hub.

FB.name: Bulgaria Air
FB.notes: Sofia hub; national carrier. ERJ-190 and A319/A320 fleet.

LG.name: Luxair
LG.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink (generous for a small carrier)
LG.notes: Luxembourg's airline; boutique feel, good service. 737 and Q400 fleet.

I2.name: Iberia Express
I2.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on base fares
I2.notes: Iberia's low-cost arm for intra-European routes. A320 family fleet from Madrid.

EN.name: Air Dolomiti
EN.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most fares (Lufthansa Group ticket rules apply)
EN.notes: Italian regional; operates as Lufthansa partner. Serves Italian cities to Munich/Frankfurt.

YW.name: Air Nostrum
YW.notes: Iberia's Spanish regional franchise. CRJ and ATR fleet connecting smaller Spanish cities.

HH.name: Edelweiss Air
HH.checkedBagFee: 1 bag included on most holiday fares
HH.notes: Swiss charter/leisure airline (SWISS Group). A320 and A340 fleet; holiday routes from Zürich.

VJ.name: VietJet Air
VJ.notes: Vietnam's largest low-cost carrier. Very cheap fares; buy baggage in advance for best rates.

QH.name: Bamboo Airways
QH.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink; meal on long-haul
QH.notes: Vietnamese hybrid carrier with 787 long-haul and A320 domestic fleet. Above-budget service.

PG.name: Bangkok Airways
PG.freeSnacks: Free meal even on short hops — one of Asia's best for snacks
PG.notes: Thailand boutique carrier. Complimentary meal on every flight, including short domestic legs. A319/A320/ATR fleet.

JT.name: Lion Air
JT.notes: Indonesia's largest low-cost carrier. Very cheap fares; punctuality can be variable.

ID.name: Batik Air
ID.notes: Lion Air Group's full-service arm in Indonesia. Better service than Lion Air itself.

OD.name: Batik Air Malaysia
OD.notes: Malaysia's Lion Air Group carrier (formerly Malindo Air). Kuala Lumpur hub; regional Southeast Asia.

DD.name: Nok Air
DD.notes: Thai low-cost subsidiary of Thai Airways. Domestic Thailand and short regional routes.

SL.name: Thai Lion Air
SL.notes: Lion Air Group's Thai operation. Budget fares for domestic Thailand and short Southeast Asia hops.

QG.name: Citilink
QG.notes: Garuda Indonesia's low-cost subsidiary. Domestic Indonesia routes; A320 fleet.

MM.name: Peach Aviation
MM.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only carry-on free on base fares
MM.notes: ANA's Japanese low-cost carrier. Very strict on bag fees — buy in advance. A320 fleet.

ZG.name: Zipair Tokyo
ZG.checkedBagFee: Per bag; seats only on cheapest tier
ZG.freeSnacks: None — buy on board; food sets available for advance purchase
ZG.notes: JAL's long-haul budget arm (787-8). Tokyo Narita to US, Southeast Asia, Korea. USB-C and AC at every seat is rare for a budget carrier.

BC.name: Skymark Airlines
BC.notes: Japan's independent mid-market carrier. Better pitch than LCCs; 737 and A330 fleet.

GK.name: Jetstar Japan
GK.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on only free on base fares
GK.notes: Qantas/JAL joint venture in Japan. Budget fares for domestic Japan and short Asia routes.

IX.name: Air India Express
IX.notes: Air India's low-cost arm for Indian cities and Gulf routes. 737-800 and A320neo fleet.

UL.name: SriLankan Airlines
UL.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares
UL.notes: Colombo hub; oneworld. Generous baggage; solid connecting hub for South Asia.

BG.name: Biman Bangladesh Airlines
BG.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares (very generous)
BG.notes: Dhaka hub; national carrier of Bangladesh. 787 Dreamliner on long-haul; baggage allowance is exceptional.

PK.name: Pakistan International Airlines
PK.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23kg) free on most international fares
PK.notes: Karachi/Islamabad/Lahore hubs. 777 on long-haul; genuine full-service at budget prices.

HO.name: Juneyao Airlines
HO.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
HO.notes: Shanghai hub; Star Alliance member; 787 international routes to Europe.

ZH.name: Shenzhen Airlines
ZH.notes: Air China subsidiary; Shenzhen hub; Star Alliance member.

MF.name: Xiamen Airlines
MF.notes: China Southern subsidiary; Xiamen and Fuzhou hubs. 737 and 787 fleet.

3U.name: Sichuan Airlines
3U.notes: Chengdu hub; SkyTeam; growing long-haul network with A350.

EU.name: Chengdu Airlines
EU.notes: Air China subsidiary; domestic China routes from Chengdu.

JD.name: Capital Airlines
JD.notes: HNA Group; Beijing hub. A330 international routes.

GS.name: Tianjin Airlines
GS.notes: HNA Group; Tianjin hub. Domestic China and some international.

OM.name: MIAT Mongolian Airlines
OM.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares
OM.notes: Mongolia's flag carrier; Ulaanbaatar hub. 767/737 fleet; limited but adequate service.

KC.name: Air Astana
KC.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
KC.notes: Kazakhstan's flag carrier; Almaty/Nur-Sultan hubs. Well-regarded; 787 on long-haul. STAR alliance partner.

HY.name: Uzbekistan Airways
HY.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares (very generous)
HY.notes: Tashkent hub. 787 and 767 on long-haul. Generous baggage makes it attractive for transits.

J2.name: Azerbaijan Airlines (AZAL)
J2.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags free on most international fares
J2.notes: Baku hub; growing European and post-Soviet network. 787 Dreamliners on long-haul.

TW.name: T'way Air
TW.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
TW.notes: South Korean low-cost carrier. Intra-Asia and growing long-haul routes. 737 fleet.

LJ.name: Jin Air
LJ.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
LJ.notes: Korean Air's low-cost subsidiary; Seoul Incheon hub. 737 fleet.

BX.name: Air Busan
BX.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
BX.notes: Asiana/Korean Air subsidiary; Busan hub. Domestic Korea and short Asia hops.

RS.name: Air Seoul
RS.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin bag free
RS.notes: Asiana subsidiary; Seoul Incheon hub. Budget fares for Japan and Southeast Asia routes.

D7.name: AirAsia X
D7.checkedBagFee: Per bag; Premium Flatbed included in Premium tier
D7.freeSnacks: None in economy — buy on board
D7.notes: AirAsia's long-haul budget arm (A330). Kuala Lumpur to Australia, Japan, Korea. Budget on long routes.

FD.name: Thai AirAsia
FD.notes: AirAsia's Thai subsidiary; Bangkok Don Mueang hub. Budget domestic Thailand and short Southeast Asia hops.

QZ.name: AirAsia Indonesia
QZ.notes: AirAsia's Indonesian arm; Jakarta and Bali hubs. Budget regional Southeast Asia.

FZ.name: flydubai
FZ.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
FZ.notes: Emirates Group's low-cost arm; Dubai hub. 737 MAX fleet; well-maintained aircraft. Codeshares with Emirates.

G9.name: Air Arabia
G9.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a cabin bag free
G9.notes: Sharjah-based ULCC; first and largest low-cost carrier in Middle East and Africa. A320 fleet.

J9.name: Jazeera Airways
J9.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
J9.notes: Kuwait-based low-cost carrier. A320neo fleet; expanding Gulf and Indian subcontinent routes.

XY.name: flynas
XY.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
XY.notes: Saudi Arabia's low-cost carrier. A320neo fleet; domestic KSA and regional Middle East routes.

F3.name: flyadeal
F3.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
F3.notes: Saudia's low-cost subsidiary. A320neo fleet; domestic Saudi Arabia budget routes.

FA.name: FlySafair
FA.notes: South Africa's low-cost leader; 737-800 fleet. Consistently on-time; great value domestic SA routes.

4Z.name: Airlink
4Z.notes: South African regional; connects smaller cities and cross-border southern Africa. ERJ and ARJ21 fleet.

TU.name: Tunisair
TU.checkedBagFee: 1 bag free on most international fares
TU.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink on most flights
TU.notes: Tunisia's flag carrier; Tunis hub. A320 fleet; solid connections to Europe.

AH.name: Air Algérie
AH.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares (generous)
AH.notes: Algeria's national carrier; Algiers hub. 737 and A330 fleet; generous baggage allowance.

DT.name: TAAG Angola Airlines
DT.checkedBagFee: 2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares
DT.notes: Luanda hub; sub-Saharan African network. 777 and 737 fleet.

MK.name: Air Mauritius
MK.checkedBagFee: 1–2 bags (23–30kg) free on most international fares
MK.notes: Mauritius flag carrier; gateway to the Indian Ocean. A330 and A350 fleet.

PW.name: Precision Air
PW.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink on most flights
PW.notes: Tanzania's largest airline; Dar es Salaam hub. ATR and A220 fleet.

P4.name: Air Peace
P4.freeSnacks: Free snack + drink on most flights
P4.notes: Nigeria's largest airline; Lagos hub. Growing West African and international network. 737 and E145 fleet.

VB.name: VivaAerobus
VB.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on charged on base fares
VB.carryOnDimensions: Free under-seat item only; overhead (+$): 21.7 × 15.7 × 9.8 in (55 × 40 × 25 cm)
VB.notes: Mexican ultra-low-cost; A320/A321 fleet. Base fares are very cheap; fees can double the price fast.

H2.name: Sky Airline
H2.checkedBagFee: Per bag; carry-on included on most fares
H2.notes: Chilean low-cost carrier; Santiago hub. A320neo fleet; domestic Chile and neighboring countries.

JA.name: JetSMART
JA.checkedBagFee: Per bag; only a small personal bag free
JA.carryOnDimensions: Free personal bag: 17.7 × 11.8 × 9.8 in (45 × 30 × 25 cm); overhead (+$): 22 × 13.8 × 9.1 in
JA.notes: South American ULCC (Indigo Partners); Chile, Argentina, Peru. A320neo fleet; strict fees on everything extra.

P5.name: Wingo
P5.notes: Copa Holdings' Colombian budget brand; Bogotá hub. 737-800 fleet; regional Latin America.

2K.name: Aeroméxico Connect
2K.notes: Aeroméxico's regional operation using ERJ-190s. Fees and status match your Aeroméxico mainline ticket.

4O.name: Interjet
4O.notes: Mexican carrier suspended operations (2020–). Known for wide Sukhoi Superjet economy seats when active.

KN.name: China United Airlines
KN.notes: HNA Group; Beijing Nanyuan hub (now Capital). Domestic China charter and scheduled routes.

8L.name: Lucky Air
8L.notes: Yunnan-based Chinese carrier; Hainan Group. Domestic China and Southeast Asia routes.

OQ.name: Chongqing Airlines
OQ.notes: China Southern subsidiary; Chongqing hub. Domestic China routes.
